owner_name.description: First and last name of the clinic owner or decision maker calling.

clinic_name.description: The name of the dental clinic.

phone_number.description: The callback number provided by the owner in E.164 format (+1...).

current_reception_pain.description: A 1-2 sentence summary of why they are interested (e.g. 'Missing 30% of calls', 'Too many no-shows', 'Receptionist is overwhelmed').

pilot_appointment.description: Did the owner commit to a morning or afternoon pilot setup appointment?
